description_long: This is a wide, cylindrical cup with a single rounded handle attached to one side. The cup is predominantly white, featuring a broad horizontal band of light blue with a subtle, repeating scale-like pattern encircling its midsection. The handle is smoothly integrated into the body, providing a comfortable grip. The rim and base of the cup are plain white, contrasting with the decorative blue band. The interior appears to be the same white material as the exterior, likely ceramic or porcelain. The overall design is modern and clean, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A wide, white cup with a blue patterned band and a single rounded handle, featuring a modern, clean design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the handle on the left and the blue patterned band wrapping around the cup.
description_view_1: Front view with the handle not visible, highlighting the continuous blue patterned band.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the right, again showing the blue band and white rim.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handle centered, displaying the blue band and the handle's attachment points.
